subcodes.first_line: I am consumed in the fire of separation from Thee; where is the light of reunion with Thee, O Thou Who art the Beloved and Desire of the world?
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد احرقتنی نار فراقک این نور وصالک یا محبوب العالم و مقصوده قد اهلکنی عذاب
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
